texto: The more he loved and was loved, the better his life got. At once it seemed to Jack like a magical solution to everything. If only everyone loved everyone else! Then there would be no trouble in the world. It seemed so easy. If we all just reached our hands out to each other, what peaks of human joy could we not achieve!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Don Carpenter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “The more he loved and was loved, the better his life got. At once it seemed to Jack like a magica…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, joy, life-lessons pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de life-lessons e love.
